title: Water Pollution Progress at Borders: The Role of Changes in China's Political Promotion Incentives
notes: Kahn, Li, Zhao (2015). AEJ: Economic Policy. Outcome: cod = Chemical Oxygen Demand (mg/L). Single timing: 2006 policy shift (11th Five-Year Plan binding COD reduction targets). Treatment: boundary stations vs interior stations. 497 monitoring stations, 7 years (2004-2010), 3377 obs. Stata: xtivreg2 cod bypost06 gdpg gdpp temperature lightbuffer5km year_dummy*, fe cluster(w riversystem). Paper uses 2-way clustering (station + riversystem); template uses station-level only (SEs may differ). SA disabled (single cohort). CS-NYT disabled (single cohort). Event study: by05-by10 (boundary × year dummies), with 2004 as paper's reference. Template uses -1 (2005) as reference. Table 3 Col 2: beta=-2.012, SE=1.192.
